---
title: "database.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\database.ts"
loc: 266
complexity: 14
logic_score: 1.65
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 7.26
overall_score: 4.25
---

## Intent
The `database.ts` module manages 'Mimir's Well', the persistent SQLite storage for repository intelligence. It handles full-text search (FTS) indexing for file intents, session trace logging, heartbeat persistence, and lease management for distributed agent coordination.

## Interaction Protocol
Use the exported utility functions such as `updateFtsIndex`, `saveTrace`, and `registerSpoke` to persist architectural intelligence and operational metrics to the central repository database.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 61 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.ts)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `db`
- `currentDbPath`
- `getDb`
- `getDb`
- `statsDir`
- `dbPath`
- `acquireLease`
- `acquireLease`
- `database`
- `now`
- `expiry`
- `normalizedPath`
- `existing`
- `releaseLease`
- `releaseLease`
- `database`
- `normalizedPath`
- `saveTrace`
- `saveTrace`
- `database`
- `stmt`
- `registerSpoke`
- `registerSpoke`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `spokeName`
- `spoke`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `existing`
- `savePing`
- `savePing`
- `sanitizedAgentId`
- `validActions`
- `sanitizedAction`
- `spokeId`
- `database`
- `oneHourAgo`
- `session`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `insertPing`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `sessions`
- `start`
- `end`
- `duration`
- `primaryTarget`
- `targetFile`
- `getTracesForFile`
- `getTracesForFile`
- `database`
- `normalizedPath`
- `getSessionPings`
- `getSessionPings`
- `database`
- `updateFtsIndex`
- `updateFtsIndex`
- `database`
- `normalizedPath`
- `updateChronicleIndex`
- `updateChronicleIndex`
- `database`
- `entryId`
- `searchIntents`
- `searchIntents`
- `database`
- `safeQuery`
- `codeResults`
- `loreResults`
- `getRecentSessions`
- `getRecentSessions`
- `database`
- `getPingsForSession`
- `getPingsForSession`
- `database`
- `closeDb`
- `closeDb`
